content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.8,0,1">Welcome to BlackBerry Cluster</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Violet>Thank you for joining our server.</>
<TextStyle.Violet>We hope you enjoy your adventure!</>
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,0.5">━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</>
<RichColor Color="1,0.9,0,1">Free Starter Kit</>
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Redeem your free Starter Kit in the Shop.</>
<RichColor Color="0.8,0.8,0,1">Press F2 or use the Radial Menu → Shop</>
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,0.5">━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</>
Server Features
• <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Friendly community</>
• <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Regular giveaways</>
• <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Balanced gameplay</>
• <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Custom rewards and bonuses</>
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,0.5">━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</>
TO REOPEN THIS MENU
<RichColor Color="0.5,0.5,0,1">Press F1 or Radial Menu:</>
Windows: <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Hold the "R" key</>
PlayStation: <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Hold the Square button</>
Xbox: <RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Hold the X button</>
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,0.5">━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</>
IMPORTANT
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,1">Please respect other players and follow the server rules.</>
<RichColor Color="1,1,1,0.5">━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</>
Discord Invite Code: <RichColor Color="0.2,0.3,1,1">BlackBerry</>
<RichColor Color="0.7,1,0.7,1">Join our Discord to stay updated with news, giveaways, and support.The invite button is located below.</>

or Radial Menu:

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.3,0.3,1">Server Rules</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>1. You are here voluntarily, so please respect the server staff and other players.</>

<TextStyle.White>2. Cheats, hacks, and texture exploits are strictly forbidden.</>

<TextStyle.White>3. Any kind of advertising is prohibited: links to your groups, channels, pages, addresses, or names of other servers. Only allowed with administration approval.</>

<TextStyle.White>4. Building in artifact caves, note locations, obelisks, supply drops, surface exits on Aberration, terminals on Extinction, entrances to the Aberration zone, large resource spawn areas, and similar locations is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>5. Blocking or building on player spawn points is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>6. All spikes, traps, etc. must be removed once the creature is tamed (griffin and wyvern traps may remain open).</>

<TextStyle.White>7. Building spam across the map is prohibited. All structures from such tribes may be destroyed by admin command without resource compensation.</>

<TextStyle.White>8. Creating nicknames, tribe names, or creature names containing profanity or insults is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>9. Profanity and offensive language in chats is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>10. Interfering with another player's gameplay or their taming process without permission is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>11. Discussion of politics in game chats or Discord in any form is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>12. Leaving dinos outside your base (scattering them across the map) is prohibited.</>

<TextStyle.White>13. Teleporters outside your base must be open for everyone (placing them inside caves or directly at cave entrances is prohibited).</>

<RichColor Color="0.7,0.9,1,1">By playing on our servers or being part of our community, you automatically agree to these rules.</>

content.title: <RichColor Color="1,0.8,0,1">Punishments</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>By breaking these rules, the administration has the right to choose the severity of the punishment at their own discretion.</>

<TextStyle.White>Breaking the rules may result in:</>
<TextStyle.White>• Warning</>
<TextStyle.White>• Temporary ban</>
<TextStyle.White>• Permanent ban</>
